description: A quiet mechanical cactus companion in a pink flower pot, with warm lamp eyes and a tiny blossom.

idle.notes: Gentle companion idle with small sway, soft lamp pulse, and a calm return-to-center rhythm.

walk.notes: Directional whole-pot glide rows used as scene-movement approximation, not literal foot walking.

curious.notes: Attentive lean-and-pause loop with brighter focused eye lamps.

happy.notes: Restrained pleased bounce with a gentle arm raise and brighter lamp glow.

sleep.notes: Cozy resting loop with sinking posture, dimmer lamps, and slow breathing.

active.notes: Soft active support loop for alert companion behavior.

melancholy.notes: Low-energy droop with gentle recovery, kept kind and companion-like.

walk_right.notes: Whole-pot rightward glide approximation, not literal walking.

walk_left.notes: Whole-pot leftward glide approximation, not literal walking.

drag.notes: Directional drag reuses the true-facing whole-pot glide rows.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing row
right drag uses the true right-facing row
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
pot body, cactus face direction, side knob placement, arms, flower, and lamp hatch remain directionally coherent
Spike remains readable at small size as a flower-pot mechanical cactus companion
